title: DicomFilterConfig
description: Specifies the filter configuration for DICOM resources.

resourcePathsGcsUri.description: The Cloud Storage location of the filter configuration file. The `gcs_uri` must be in the format `gs://bucket/path/to/object`. The filter configuration file must contain a list of resource paths separated by newline characters (\n or \r\n). Each resource path must be in the format "/studies/{studyUID}[/series/{seriesUID}[/instances/{instanceUID}]]" The Cloud Healthcare API service account must have the `roles/storage.objectViewer` Cloud IAM role for this Cloud Storage location.
